name: Watchtower
shortDescription: Track current holder, take daily snapshots and use these for Discord roles and airdrops.
longDescription: Watchtower lets you enable per-mint tracking: Current holders (15min–6hr sync for role rules and holder data), Snapshot (daily holder snapshots), and Transactions (coming soon). Each track is independently billable.
detailedDescription: Enable Discord track for mints used in Discord role rules. Enable Snapshot track for daily holder snapshots. Transactions track is coming soon. Pricing: 5 USDC/month per mint for Discord, 5 USDC/month per mint for Snapshot, 20 USDC/month per mint for Transactions.
keyInfo: Member page to view holder snapshots and results

activationInstructions.intro: Enable tracking for mints in your address book.
steps: Add mints in Admin > Address Book
Enable Holders, Snapshot, or Transactions per mint in Watchtower
activationInstructions.note: Holders track is required for mints used in Discord role rules.
